title: Solar Agent Actor Registry
description: Registry of logical agent actors. tmux pane index is display metadata only — actor_id is the durable key.

actor_id.description: Stable, durable logical identity. Must not be a tmux pane index.

operator_alias.description: Backward-compatibility alias to a physical-operators.json operator key.

aliases.description: Additional backward-compatibility aliases including physical operator ids.

lease.description: Lease state. All fields nullable when idle.

acquired_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when lease was acquired, null if idle.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when lease expires, null if idle.

renewable.description: Whether the lease can be renewed without restarting the actor.

preemptible.description: Whether a higher-priority task can preempt this actor's current lease.

heartbeat_timeout_sec.description: Seconds of missed heartbeats before the lease is declared expired.

lease_id.description: Opaque lease token, null if idle.

holder_sprint.description: Sprint ID currently holding this lease, null if idle.

mailbox.description: Filesystem paths for actor mailbox, relative to harness_dir unless absolute.

inbox.description: Path to inbox directory for incoming dispatch messages.

outbox.description: Path to outbox directory for outgoing handoff/status messages.

logs.description: Path to logs directory for actor execution logs.

state_json.description: Path to state.json file tracking actor runtime state.

heartbeat_json.description: Path to heartbeat.json file written by actor to signal liveness.

capability.description: Legacy aggregate capability scores (0-5). Prefer capability_profile for new actors.

capability_profile.description: Granular capability scores (0-5) for logical operator routing. Replaces vague aggregate 'capability'.

architecture_reasoning.description: Depth of system architecture and design reasoning.

root_cause_debug.description: Ability to find root causes in failing systems.

test_execution.description: Ability to run tests and interpret results.

research_synthesis.description: Depth of research and synthesis across sources.

academic_critique.description: Ability to critically evaluate technical claims and papers.

browser_use.description: Web browser automation and scraping capability.

data_extraction.description: Information and structured data extraction from DOM/visual sources.

long_context.description: Effective reasoning over very long contexts (>100K tokens).

multi_agent_coordination.description: Ability to coordinate and orchestrate multiple sub-agents.

risk_profile.description: Risk and safety constraints for this actor. Controls what the actor is allowed to do.

allowed_write_scope.description: Scope of file writes permitted: harness=all harness paths, harness_readonly=reads only, project=project workspace, denied=no writes.

allowed_secrets.description: Access to secrets: denied=none, secret_ref_only=references only, allowed=full.

destructive_actions.description: Whether actor may perform destructive file/resource operations.

git_commit.description: Whether actor may create git commits.

git_push.description: Whether actor may push to remote git repositories.

payment_or_external_action.description: Whether actor may trigger payment flows or external service actions.

requires_human_for.description: Actions that must be approved by a human before execution.

cost_profile.description: Cost and budget profile for routing and quota decisions.

cost_tier.description: Relative cost tier for this actor.

token_budget_class.description: Typical token budget per task: small<2K, medium<8K, large<32K, xlarge>32K.

reserve_ratio.description: Fraction of quota to reserve for high-priority tasks (0.0=no reserve).

effort.description: Typical task effort level for this actor.

prefer_for.description: Task types where this actor is cost-optimal.

avoid_for.description: Task types that are too expensive or inappropriate for this actor.

context_packet_ref.description: Reference to the active per-task context packet. Context is external to long-lived panes to prevent stale state.

path.description: Relative path to current context packet JSON file, null when actor is idle.

packet_id.description: Opaque packet identifier from context-store, null when actor is idle.

evidence_ledger_ref.description: Reference to the audit evidence ledger for this actor. Audit paths are external to long-lived panes.

path.description: Relative path to evidence ledger directory, null if not yet configured.

evidence.description: Audit trail and smoke-test evidence for this actor.

provenance.description: Source or migration info for this actor record.

persona_binding.description: Links this actor to a persona definition.

fallback_ladder.description: Ordered list of fallback actor_ids when this actor is unavailable.

condition.description: Condition triggering this fallback: quota_exhausted, unavailable, error, always.

display_meta.description: Non-durable display and debug metadata. tmux_pane_index MUST only appear here.

tmux_pane_index.description: tmux pane index for display/debug only. NOT a durable identity key.
